description: Internal retail pricing MCP server for cost, volume forecasts and margin data.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all product categories with aggregated weekly margin and volume.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List internal products with pricing, cost, volume and margin figures.

tools.name: get_product_pricing
tools.description: Get the full internal pricing breakdown for a single product.

tools.name: get_category_margin_forecast
tools.description: Forecast total weekly volume, revenue and gross margin for a category.

tools.name: get_volume_forecast
tools.description: Forecast weekly unit volume for a product, optionally at a new price.

tools.name: simulate_price_change
tools.description: Simulate the margin impact of moving a product to a new shelf price.

tools.name: list_personas
tools.description: List shopping personas with price sensitivity and category affinities.
